heading: Effect on other laws
label: 5847 Effect on other laws
text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed as modifying or affecting the requirements of section 38 of the Arms Export Control Act (), as amended, with respect to the manufacture, exportation, and importation of arms, ammunition, and implements of war.22 U.S.C. 2778
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5847, , , related to regulations which the Secretary or his delegate may prescribe, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 726Pub. L. 90–618
Amendments2018— substituted “section 38 of the Arms Export Control Act ()” for “section 414 of the Mutual Security Act of 1954”.Pub. L. 115–14122 U.S.C. 2778
